headline: Akamai (AKAM) Named A Gartner Customers’ Choice For Edge Distribution Platforms
summary: Akamai Technologies was named a Customers’ Choice in the 2026 Gartner Peer Insights Voice of the Customer for Edge Distribution Platforms. The recognition is based on high customer ratings and willingness to recommend from industry professionals. The award highlights Akamai’s position in edge distribution as enterprises increase their use of edge solutions. Akamai Technologies, listed as NasdaqGS:AKAM, is drawing fresh attention after being recognized as a Customers’ Choice in Gartner’s...
